The '''SRV-1 New Republic Scout and Retrieval Vehicle''' was a treaded vehicle used by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. It was driven by two soldiers, in addition to two useable turrets above the cockpit. It was capable of carrying up to eight soldiers, or three metric tons. The SRV-1 was later adapted into the [[Scout and Retrieval Vehicle/Repulsorlift]], or SRV/R-1.<ref name="Cadinth" />

==Behind the scenes==
The SRV-1 was based on a concept for a vehicle that would have been part of a proposed but ultimately rejected extension of [[Kenner Products|Kenner's]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' toy line, ''[[The Epic Continues]]''<ref name="Tales">{{GalaxyCite|2|Galactic Bazaar|Galactic Bazaar: Tales of Phantom Toys}}</ref>. An earlier version of the toy had been proposed years earlier as an unseen vehicle used by Rebels on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]<ref name="Concept">{{WebCite|url=http://theswca.com/index.php?action=disp_item&item_id=48885|text=Concept Model of Unproduced Hoth Vehicle|work=The Star Wars Collectors Archive|archivedate=20181022230235}}</ref>, but Kenner's new version was presented two ways: as a slightly modified version of the original toy's prototype<ref name="swfsrv1">{{WebCite|url=http://theswca.com/index.php?action=disp_item&item_id=50987|text=1985-86 Line Extension Presentation Binder Page 29 - Rebel SRV-1 Scout and Retrieval Vehicle|work=The Star Wars Collectors Archive|archivedate=20161118020506}}</ref>, and a heavily modified version presented as concept art<ref name="swfsrv2">{{WebCite|url=http://theswca.com/index.php?action=disp_item&item_id=50988|text=1985-86 Line Extension Presentation Binder Page 30 - Rebel SRV-1 Scout and Retrieval Vehicle|work=The Star Wars Collectors Archive|archivedate=20161118020513}}</ref>.

The vehicle and other toy concepts were added to the ''[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]'' continuity in "[[The Battle of Cadinth]]" story and roleplaying game article from [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 2|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 2]].<ref name="Cadinth" />
